prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科（含物理类）最低位次分别为约166名、106名、126名、113名、80名，整体呈波动前移趋势，2025年位次较2024年大幅前移33名，创近五年最高水平，显示报考热度持续升温；该校在吉林省理科组招生计划：2021年5人、2022年22人、2023年4人、2024年6人、2025年6人；2026年计划8人，较2025年扩招2人（增幅约33%），扩招将适度缓解竞争压力，对位次有后移作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 上海交通大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2021–2026年稳定位居第4名，属全国顶尖C9联盟高校，综合实力极强；2026年学校声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及学术不端（撤稿量较多）及校园安全事件，但作为顶尖名校，负面舆情对报考热度影响有限；抖音热度排名第42位（较热），短视频曝光量中等，未出现明显报考降温信号；历史投档异常方面，2021年曾出现河南理科投档线华五倒数第一的低关注事件，但近年未见明显断档；拥有28个A-及以上学科，其中A+学科11个（机械工程、材料科学与工程、计算机科学与技术、生物学、临床医学、口腔医学、工商管理、管理科学与工程、外国语言文学等），学科实力全国顶尖，与招生专业中的电子信息类、人工智能、金融学等高度匹配。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、人工智能等专业持续高热推荐，社会关注度极高；金融/财经/经济类呈分化观望，但交大平台优势明显；吉林省2026年考生总数110868人（较2025年111492人略减），竞争环境总体稳定；上海交通大学位于上海市，属一线城市，对东北考生有较强吸引力；学校在吉林省招生计划较少（理科组6–8人），稀缺性推高竞争烈度。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅前移至80名的强劲走势、2026年扩招33%的缓解效应、顶尖C9名校的持续吸引力以及吉林省考生规模基本稳定等因素，预计2026年理科组最低位次在2025年基准上因扩招而小幅后移；预测最低位次约96名，区间46–146名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 电子信息类（计算机永强试验班）（计算机科学与技术、软件工程、信息安全）
- 人工智能（拔尖英才试点班）
- 具身智能（拔尖英才试点班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 电子信息类（IEEE试点班，含双学士学位项目）（计算机科学与技术、信息工程、信息安全、自动化）
- 金融学（含金融学-计算机科学与技术双学士学位项目）

- 工科试验班类（生医工学院，智能医工试点班）（生物医学工程）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间（46–146名）内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底。若位次明显优于区间下限（如50名以内），可重点冲刺一档的计算机永强试验班和人工智能拔尖英才试点班；若位次接近区间上限（如130名左右），建议以三档的经济管理试验班和工科试验班类作为稳妥选择。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (including physics category) were approximately 166, 106, 126, 113, and 80 respectively, showing an overall fluctuating upward trend. In 2025, the ranking moved significantly forward by 33 places compared to 2024, reaching the highest level in five years, indicating continuously rising application enthusiasm. The university's enrollment plan for the science group in Jilin Province: 5 in 2021, 22 in 2022, 4 in 2023, 6 in 2024, and 6 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 8, an increase of 2 (approximately 33%) compared to 2025, which will moderately alleviate competition pressure and have a backward effect on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Shanghai Jiao Tong University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. It has consistently ranked 4th in the Soft Science China University Rankings from 2021 to 2026, belonging to the top C9 League universities with extremely strong comprehensive strength. In 2026, the university's reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving academic misconduct (relatively high number of retractions) and campus safety incidents. However, as a top prestigious university, negative public opinion has limited impact on application enthusiasm. Douyin popularity ranks 42nd (relatively hot), with moderate short video exposure, showing no obvious signs of cooling application enthusiasm. Regarding historical admission anomalies, in 2021 there was a low-attention event where the science admission line in Henan ranked last among the Huawu Five, but no obvious gaps have been seen in recent years. It has 28 A- or above disciplines, including 11 A+ disciplines (Mechanical Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, Computer Science and Technology, Biology, Clinical Medicine, Stomatology, Business Administration, Management Science and Engineering, Foreign Languages and Literature, etc.), with top national disciplinary strength, highly matching the enrollment majors such as Electronic Information, Artificial Intelligence, and Finance.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Artificial Intelligence continue to be highly recommended with extremely high social attention. Finance/Banking/Economics majors show differentiation and wait-and-see attitudes, but SJTU's platform advantages are obvious. In 2026, the total number of examinees in Jilin Province is 110,868 (slightly decreased from 111,492 in 2025), with a generally stable competitive environment. Shanghai Jiao Tong University is located in Shanghai, a first-tier city, which has strong appeal to candidates from Northeast China. The university has a small enrollment plan in Jilin Province (6-8 in the science group), and scarcity increases competition intensity.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the strong trend of the 2025 ranking moving significantly forward to 80, the mitigating effect of the 33% enrollment expansion in 2026, the sustained appeal of a top C9 prestigious university, and the basically stable number of examinees in Jilin Province, it is predicted that the minimum ranking for the science group in 2026 will slightly move backward due to the enrollment expansion based on the 2025 benchmark. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 96, with a range of 46-146.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Electronic Information (Computer Yongqiang Pilot Class) (Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering, Information Security)
- Artificial Intelligence (Top Talent Pilot Class)
- Embodied Intelligence (Top Talent Pilot Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Electronic Information (IEEE Pilot Class, including Dual Degree Program) (Computer Science and Technology, Information Engineering, Information Security, Automation)
- Finance (including Finance-Computer Science and Technology Dual Degree Program)
- Electrical Engineering and Automation (Siyuan Pilot Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)
- Economics and Management Pilot Class (including Dual Degree Program) (Economics, Finance, Accounting, Business Administration, Human Resource Management, Big Data Management and Application)
- Engineering Pilot Class (School of Biomedical Engineering, Intelligent Medical Engineering Pilot Class) (Biomedical Engineering).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range (46-146), it is recommended to mainly apply for Tier 2 majors, aim for Tier 1 majors, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 50), you can focus on aiming for Tier 1 majors such as the Computer Yongqiang Pilot Class and the Artificial Intelligence Top Talent Pilot Class. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., around 130), it is recommended to choose Tier 3 majors such as the Economics and Management Pilot Class and the Engineering Pilot Class as stable choices.
